calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jun-04-2021 Off Calendar

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Apr-06-2021 Continued To Jun-23-21 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

Notice Of Motion To Set Evidentiary Hearing
Off Calendar Mar-11-2021 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This matter came on calendar this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing as to defendants Elizabeth Oestermann and Klaus Oestermann.
Dept. 514. Judge: Murlene J. Randle. Clerk: Kevin Dougherty. Reporter: Giselle Casey, CSR #8098. Telephone: 415-551-3680. Email: gcasey@sftc.org.

Patrick D. Reider, Esq. appeared with plaintiff Danette Pachtner, Successor Trustee Under the Kathryn Pachtner 2018 Living Trust, Dated November 30, 2018, who was placed under oath and testified.
Lisa Campbell, Senior Claims Consel with First American Title, was placed under oath and testified.
No Appearance by defendants Elizabeth Oestermann or Klaus Oestermann.

Plaintiff's Complaint to Quiet Title and for Declaratory Relief was filed on October 31, 2019, and personally served on defendant Elizabeth Oestermann on March 31, 2020.
Substitute Service of plaintiff's Summons, Complaint and accompanying documents on defendant Klaus Oestermann occurred on March 31, 2020, and was effectuated on April 11, 2020.
Default as to both defendants was entered on June 18, 2020.
Dismissal as to "All Persons Unknown" and DOES 1 through 50 was filed on July 15, 2020.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of plaintiff Danette Pachtner, Successor Trustee Under the Kathryn Pachtner 2018 Living Trust, Dated November 30, 2018, and against the defaulted defendants Elizabeth Oestermann and Klaus Oestermann, as follows:

As of September 30, 2014, Plaintiff Danette Pachtner, Successor Trustee Under the Kathryn Pachtner 2018 Living Trust, Dated November 30, 2018, is the fee owner of the real property commonly known as 153 Vicksburg Street, San Francisco, California 94114 (the "Property"), which is designated as Assessor's Parcel No. 072 Block Number: 3651. (See Judgment for description of the subject property).

Counsel for plaintiff shall prepare the proposed Judgment and submit same to the Court for review and signature.
